title: Chalk Finish Spray Pale Rose 400ml
features: High performance for the home or tradesman
Package Dimensions: 7.0 L x 20.0 H x 7.0 W (centimetres)
description: PlastiKote Chalk Spray is a chalk-effect spray for decoration, furnishing, design, restoration or interior fittings. Can be used on virtually any surface, especially on wooden furniture. Creates an ultra matt finish. It has a water-based formula that is environmentally friendly and is odour free. Suitable for interior and exterior use. The product can be sanded and washed back from 10 minutes after application to create a rustic look. PlastiKote gold and silver leaf paints can also be used underneath the chalk spray to create wonderful furniture effects. Coverage: Up to 1.4m² per 400ml.
